citation_and_locator: Yiu, Yuk Man Carine. 2008. The formation of the inchoative aspect marker heisoenglai in Cantonese. Bulletin of Chinese Linguistics 2:127-148. DOI 10.1163/2405478X-90000043; official HKUST research record abstract; https://researchportal.hkust.edu.hk/en/publications/the-formation-of-the-inchoative-aspect-marker-heisoenglai-in-cant/
claim_supported: Directly identifies 起嚟 and 起上嚟 as similar Cantonese inchoative markers indicating that an event or state begins; states that overt objects split the forms as 起+O+嚟 and 起+O+上嚟; gives the proposed directional grammaticalization source and historical chronology.
limitation: Only the official abstract was accessible in this research pass; exact article examples, full predicate inventory, regional distribution, and modern acceptability boundaries could not be checked from the article body.

citation_and_locator: Yiu, Carine Yuk-man (姚玉敏). 2016. 粵語繼續體「落去」和開始體「起嚟」的產生. New Horizons in the Study of Chinese, pp. 261-284; official CUHK PDF; abstract and pp. 261-269, especially examples 3-6, 9, 29, 31, 38, 42; https://www.cuhk.edu.hk/ics/clrc/yue/20_carine_yiu.pdf
claim_supported: Directly identifies postpredicative 起嚟 as beginning of an action or change; attests dynamic and state hosts; documents split object order 學起法文嚟; distinguishes literal upward/deictic self-motion and caused motion; analyzes 起嚟 as structurally unlike ordinary compound directionals.
limitation: The chapter focuses on formation and directional/aspectual comparison. Historical evidence does not establish unrestricted modern productivity; potential restrictions shown for directional uses must not be generalized automatically to all aspectual uses.

citation_and_locator: Matthews, Stephen and Virginia Yip. 2011. Cantonese: A Comprehensive Grammar, 2nd ed., multimedia supplement, Chapter 11 §11.2.8; 佢好突然咁喊起上嚟; https://www.cuhk.edu.hk/lin/cbrc/CantoneseGrammar/multimedia/11.htm
claim_supported: Independently classifies 起上嚟 as inchoative and directly attests sudden onset with 喊.
limitation: The supplement supplies one compact example and does not establish object splitting, negation, modal interaction, lexical-class limits, or discourse subtypes.

citation_and_locator: Yip, Virginia and Stephen Matthews. 2017. Intermediate Cantonese: A Grammar and Workbook, 2nd ed., Unit 12, pp. 75-79; accessible text lines 1644-1646, 1774-1776, 3669-3670; https://dokumen.pub/intermediate-cantonese-a-grammar-and-workbook-grammar-workbooks-2nbsped-0415815606-9780415815604.html
claim_supported: States that postverbal 起上嚟 denotes beginning of an action; says it is characteristically used in subordinate clauses; directly gives 一…就 and split transitive/verb-object examples such as 發起脾氣上嚟 and 打起網球上嚟; supplies additional controlled exercise profiles.
limitation: A pedagogical grammar and exercise set is not a representative corpus or controlled acceptability panel. Exercise answers support documented patterns but not unrestricted lexical productivity.

citation_and_locator: Words.hk entries checked 2026-07-23: 不禁 lines 22-26 and 56-64, 得人驚 lines 22-26 and 50-57, 不可理喻 lines 22-26 and 49-56, 齙牙 lines 22-26 and 50-58; examples 喊起上嚟, 發起脾氣上嚟, 野蠻起上嚟, 笑起上嚟; https://words.hk/
claim_supported: Supplies contemporary attestations of triggered emotional onset, split verb-object structure, state/property manifestation, and generic when/once interpretation.
limitation: Lexicographic examples do not establish frequency, complete syntactic restrictions, or universal speaker judgments; individual translations sometimes favor generic when-readings rather than explicit one-time onset.
